ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for the region */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for the region */,
  "code3" INTEGER /* Three-digit code for the region */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Administrative division 2 for the region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state for the region */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region for the region */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long_" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "combined_key" TEXT /* Combined key for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the region */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the data is collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is collected */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases for the region */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths for the region */,
  "recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the user (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data submission */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region submitting the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)
